purpose: Future merge validation must reject or skip generated recurring preview records. Previews are derived from source records and must not be synced as source-of-truth data.

expectedStagedResult.reason: Record is flagged as a generated preview. Generated previews are derived records and must not be applied as persisted transactions.

expectedReport.message: Generated recurring preview ignored. Previews are derived records and must not sync as source-of-truth.

safetyNotes: Do not create transactions from preview records.
Do not mark generated future items paid during sync.
Do not generate recurring occurrences during merge evaluation.
Do not call recurring mark-paid or posting functions.
Skip all records where isGeneratedPreview is true.
